live_migration_support_notes: OSS-style live migration depends on ScratchBird write-proxy capture or time-window polling; no universal native deterministic CDC is assumed.
initial_snapshot_or_seed: bucket/database export or line-protocol/query-window extract by measurement/time range
delta_feed_or_change_capture: write proxy observation with series/key/time watermark; native replication/subscription only when source version exposes it
proxy_method: HTTP/line protocol/query proxy with bucket/measurement readiness routing
alternate_or_fallback: time-window polling with final write pause; no transaction-consistent live claim without exact write feed
required_cutover_barrier: final write window closed; series cardinality and retention policy mapped; query/window compare clean
parser_worker_scope: parse reference migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render reference diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to ReferenceLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; reference feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests reference regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
